commands.review_summary:
The PR updates cached plugin descriptor execution to select matching named then unnamed runtime tool factories by actual tool name, adds regression tests and a changelog entry, and currently carries a media-generation helper refactor.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main can select the first unnamed factory through shared plugin-level declaredNames, and the linked live report provides the multi-tool plugin shape that triggers plugin tool runtime missing for sibling tools.
